name: LTX-2 Pipeline Adapter
description: WASM protocol adapter for LTX-2 ltx-pipelines server. Implements adapt_request (build job submission payload), adapt_response (handle pending/done poll loop), and health_check for the model-manager managed service system.
author: BiloxiStudios

adapt_request.description: Convert GenerateRequest to LTX-2 server submission payload
adapt_request.output: AdaptedRequest (JSON with url, method, headers, body, timeout_ms)

adapt_response.description: Handle LTX-2 server response — returns done/pending/error

health_check.description: Check if LTX-2 server is healthy
health_check.output: HealthCheckResult (JSON with healthy: bool, message: optional string)
